title: OR CFP Q2 2024: Renewable Diesel Continues to Lead Oregon CFP Credits in Q2 2024 Despite Decline in Volumes
content: In Q2 2024, Oregonâ€™s Clean Fuels Program saw renewable diesel as the top credit generator despite a decline in volume, while ethanol <55 and biodiesel credits surged due to increased volumes. Gasoline remained the largest source of deficits, which rose 13.11% QoQ, continuing its trend as the primary contributor to CFP deficits.
author: Mansift Kaur
